name: Sarah Bernhardt
description: French stage actress, painter and sculptor (1844–1923)
abstract: Sarah Bernhardt (French: [saʁa bɛʁnɑʁt]; born Henriette-Rosine Bernard; 22 October 1844 – 26 March 1923) was a French stage actress who starred in some of the most popular French plays of the late 19th and early 20th centuries, including La Dame aux Camélias by Alexandre Dumas fils, Ruy Blas by Victor Hugo, Fédora and La Tosca by Victori…

about_quotes.speaker: Alberta Hunter
about_quotes.evidence: Cecile Sorel, who was the woman, the Sarah Bernhardt of France
